mission_title: Agent Fox Technical Core V1A-3F — Live Chat Self-Knowledge Integration Seam Preflight

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import ast
import hashlib
import json

root = Path("Z:/FOXAI")
drop = root / "AGENT_FOX_V1A3F"
installed = root / "System/AgentFoxTechnicalCore"
checks = [
    (drop / "live_chat_integration_seam_preflight_v1.py", installed / "live_chat_integration_seam_preflight_v1.py", "b11f1280211cfbbc8ec74b79a831341caf35d22b54f3d42b9183b3fe0a6a52a1"),
    (drop / "LIVE_CHAT_INTEGRATION_SEAM_PREFLIGHT_CONTRACT_V1.json", installed / "LIVE_CHAT_INTEGRATION_SEAM_PREFLIGHT_CONTRACT_V1.json", "8ebd441a5c254ff3c5c12d0eff834a6b16dab7cd68e9fd7d92d038a0186920ec"),
    (drop / "README_V1A3F.md", installed / "README_V1A3F.md", "0b2170a8bf790ad8e9ffe4456bb3a07f35e0285470f2ed8f6f151ef6eadbc939"),
]
for source, target, expected_hash in checks:
    assert source.is_file(), source
    assert target.is_file(), target
    assert hashlib.sha256(source.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash
    assert hashlib.sha256(target.read_bytes()).hexdigest() == expected_hash
script_text = (installed / "live_chat_integration_seam_preflight_v1.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
compile(script_text, str(installed / "live_chat_integration_seam_preflight_v1.py"), "exec")
tree = ast.parse(script_text)
imports = set()
for node in ast.walk(tree):
    if isinstance(node, ast.Import):
        imports.update(alias.name.split(".")[0] for alias in node.names)
    elif isinstance(node, ast.ImportFrom) and node.module:
        imports.add(node.module.split(".")[0])
forbidden = {
    "subprocess", "socket", "urllib", "http", "ftplib", "requests",
    "pip", "ensurepip", "psutil", "winreg", "ctypes", "webbrowser", "importlib",
}
assert not (imports & forbidden), sorted(imports & forbidden)
contract = json.loads((installed / "LIVE_CHAT_INTEGRATION_SEAM_PREFLIGHT_CONTRACT_V1.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert contract["mission_id"] == "ENG-20260722-003059-4F07D0"
assert contract["verified_receipt_count"] == 5
assert contract["deduplicated_first_party_source_count"] == 76
assert contract["supported_intent_count"] == 11
assert contract["integration_test_count"] == 28
assert len(contract["outputs"]) == 8
assert contract["scope"]["maximum_reads_per_source_file"] == 1
assert contract["scope"]["recognized_request_model_bypass_required"] is True
assert contract["scope"]["ambiguous_request_clarification_required"] is True
assert contract["scope"]["unrecognized_request_pass_through_required"] is True
assert contract["scope"]["live_patch_performed"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3F_INSTALL_PREFLIGHT_OK")
validations.name: Verify exact V1A-3F payloads, syntax, contract, and zero forbidden imports
Run bounded seam classifier, adapter, and route-policy self-tests
Hash-verify V1A-3E, V1A-3D, and three authoritative closure evidence sets
Verify exact 76-source deduplicated closure topology before live source reads
Build bounded WebUI and Desktop self-knowledge integration seam preflight
Validate exact eight-output preflight, deterministic hashes, read ceilings, and safety boundaries

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
index = Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-003059-4F07D0_V1A3F_LIVE_CHAT_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_SEAM_PREFLIGHT")
route = json.loads((index / "CHAT_SURFACE_ROUTE_MAP.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
adapter = json.loads((index / "PROPOSED_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_ADAPTER_CONTRACT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
tests = json.loads((index / "INTEGRATION_TEST_MATRIX.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
assert {row["surface"] for row in route["surfaces"]} == {"webui", "desktop"}
assert route["shared_adapter_feasibility"]["one_shared_read_only_adapter_possible"] is True
assert adapter["supported_intent_count"] == 11
assert len(adapter["routing_rules"]) == 5
assert any(row["condition"] == "recognized exact self-knowledge request" and row["model_bypass"] is True for row in adapter["routing_rules"])
assert any(row["condition"] == "ambiguous self-knowledge request" and row["model_bypass"] is True for row in adapter["routing_rules"])
assert any(row["condition"] == "unrecognized ordinary chat" and row["ordinary_chat_pass_through"] is True for row in adapter["routing_rules"])
assert tests["test_count"] == 28
assert {row["surface"] for row in tests["tests"]} == {"webui", "desktop"}
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3F_ROUTE_CONTRACT_OK")
validations.name: Validate both chat surfaces, eleven intents, model bypass, clarification, and pass-through contract

argv:
from pathlib import Path
import json
index = Path(r"Z:/FOXAI/System/EngineeringWorkshop/missions/ENG-20260722-003059-4F07D0_V1A3F_LIVE_CHAT_SELF_KNOWLEDGE_INTEGRATION_SEAM_PREFLIGHT")
patches = json.loads((index / "PATCH_CANDIDATES.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
coverage = json.loads((index / "INTEGRATION_PREFLIGHT_COVERAGE.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
receipt = json.loads((index / "INTEGRATION_PREFLIGHT_RECEIPT.json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
for row in patches["candidates"]:
    if row["safely_patchable_with_current_static_evidence"]:
        assert len(row["source_sha256"]) == 64
        assert row["locator"]["start_line"] > 0
        assert len(row["locator"]["statement_locator"]["statement_sha256"]) == 64
assert coverage["deduplicated_first_party_source_count"] == 76
assert coverage["source_files_read_count"] == 76
assert coverage["maximum_reads_per_source_file"] == 1
assert coverage["source_execution_count"] == 0
assert coverage["imported_foxai_module_count"] == 0
assert receipt["exact_output_count_including_receipt"] == 8
assert receipt["internal_deterministic_rebuild_match"] is True
assert receipt["existing_foxai_source_modified"] is False
assert receipt["live_patch_performed"] is False
assert receipt["rollback_t7_k_accessed"] is False
print("AGENT_FOX_V1A3F_PATCH_AND_SAFETY_OK")
validations.name: Validate exact hash-and-locator patch evidence and no live integration or source modification
